title: FishCraft By Alan
description: FishCraft is a comprehensive fishing overhaul plugin that replaces Minecraft's vanilla fishing system with a fully customizable, progression-based experience. Perfect for RPG, economy, and survival servers looking to make fishing more rewarding
body:
# 🎣 FishCraft ### Premium Custom Fishing Plugin for Minecraft *Transform fishing into an engaging progression system* [![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/version-1.0.0-blue.svg)](https://github.com/Eldrath-Dev/FishCraft-By-Alan) [![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/minecraft-1.21.4-brightgreen.svg)](https://www.minecraft.net/) [![Java](https://img.shields.io/badge/java-17-orange.svg)](https://www.java.com/) [![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-green.svg)](LICENSE) [Features](#-features) • [Installation](#-installation) • [Commands](#-commands) • [Configuration](#-configuration) • [Support](#-support)
--- ## 📋 Overview **FishCraft** is a comprehensive fishing overhaul plugin that replaces Minecraft's vanilla fishing system with a fully customizable, progression-based experience. Perfect for RPG, economy, and survival servers looking to make fishing more rewarding and strategic. ### 🎯 Why FishCraft? - **Fully Customizable Loot** - Complete control over what players catch - **Progression System** - Daily streaks reward dedicated fishermen - **Powerful Buffs** - Temporary boosts for faster fishing and better loot - **Advanced Statistics** - Track every catch, streak, and rare find - **Zero Performance Impact** - Async database operations, optimized code - **Beautiful Messages** - Fully customizable colored chat messages - **Admin-Friendly** - Intuitive commands with tab completion --- ## ✨ Features ### 🎲 Custom Loot System - Replace all vanilla fishing drops with your own items - Weighted probability system for balanced gameplay - Rarity tiers: Common, Uncommon, Rare - Add any Minecraft item with custom drop chances - Real-time loot table management ### 📈 Daily Streak Progression - Players earn streak bonuses for fishing daily - **+0.0015% rare loot chance per day** (configurable) - Automatic streak tracking and management - Longest streak records - Configurable reset timers ### 💎 Temporary Buffs #### Lure Buff - **50% faster fishing** (configurable multiplier) - Reduces wait time between bites - Perfect for events or rewards #### Luck Buff - **+5% rare loot chance** (configurable) - Stack with streak bonuses - Great for VIP perks ### 📊 Advanced Statistics Track comprehensive player data: - Total fish caught - Rare loot discoveries - Current & longest streaks - Rare loot percentage - Active buff status - Last fishing timestamp ### 🎨 Visual & Audio Effects - Custom particle effects for catches - Special effects for rare loot - Buff activation animations - Sound effects for all events - NMS-based for optimal performance ### 💾 Robust Data Management - SQLite database with async operations - Automatic data saving - No server lag from database operations - Data persistence across restarts - Admin tools for data management ---
